name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement

labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]

## Problem / motivation

<!-- What need are you covering? What pain are you solving? -->
<!-- Example: "Today I have to open the DB manually for X; it would be faster if Tortuga..." -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What you'd like to happen. Be concrete. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other ways to solve the same problem and why you discarded them. -->

## Impact

- [ ] UI (web / desktop)
- [ ] Sidecar (HTTP API)
- [ ] MCP tools
- [ ] DB schema / migration
- [ ] Configuration / breaking change for current users
- [ ] Docs only

## Mockups / references

<!-- Screenshots, links to similar products, diagrams. Optional. -->

## Notes

<!-- Anything else worth knowing. Optional. -->
